published_prior_art.cite: BorusyakJaravelSpiess2024: efficient imputation plus restricted Wooldridge equivalence, but no exact four-estimator canonical IF variance identity

repo_prior_art.cite: panel_honest_did_phase: cohort-vs-aggregate Honest-DiD support-function frontier; q1_spectral_phase_transition: Markov event-window row-space phase transition; neither is a BJS/SA/CS/Wooldridge IF frontier

published_prior_art.cite: BorusyakJaravelSpiess2024 and ChenSantAnnaXie2025 give EIF/efficiency anchors, but not a necessary-and-sufficient four-estimator quotient IF-equivalence condition

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §2.2 Regression.homogeneous_collapse_general: homogeneous-response collapse under row-sum and contamination cancellation

published_prior_art.cite: SunAbraham2021, CallawaySantAnna2021, Wooldridge2021: homogeneous/ATT equivalence corner is implicit, but not phrased as quotient-loading normalization

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest survey misses at least one direct estimator-comparison paper: the 2025 Journal of Econometrics paper 'A comparative analysis of two-way fixed effects estimators in staggered treatment designs' explicitly compares extended TWFE/BJS/Wooldridge with CS-style DiD equivalences and must be separated from the proposed IF frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Assumption 8 / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The proposal calls the BJS influence function an 'efficient score'; the load-bearing object should be the efficient influence function/canonical gradient, with orthogonality stated in the tangent-space projection language.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add the missed 2025 TWFE-comparison paper, and optionally Roth 2026 on interpreting modern DiD event-study plots, to §5 and the Conjecture 1 prior-art block, stating exactly why estimand/equivalence comparisons do not settle canonical IF equivalence.
Replace 'efficient score' by 'efficient influence function/canonical gradient' throughout and make the orthogonality condition a canonical normalization or tangent-space projection condition.

Turn the conjectural Γ construction into a concrete Stage 0 recipe: comparison-set incidence matrices, FWL residualization, quotient by ker(a), Σ-whitening, and a smallest three-period two-cohort worked example.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature comparison and EIF terminology, then proceed only if the Γ construction can be made explicit enough to preserve the flagship frontier claim.
